name: k6-performance
description: Pruebas de performance parametrizables para la API ServeRest usando K6

scripts.test:load:post: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=post-usuarios tests/load-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.test:load:get: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=get-usuarios  tests/load-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.test:load:put: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=put-usuarios  tests/load-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.test:stress:post: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=post-usuarios tests/stress-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.test:stress:get: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=get-usuarios  tests/stress-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.test:stress:put: k6 run --env ENDPOINT=put-usuarios  tests/stress-test.js ; npm run generate-pdf
scripts.clean:results: del /q results\html\*.* 2>nul & del /q results\json\*.* 2>nul & del /q results\pdf\*.* 2>nul
